prevalence.source: WHO/IHME GBD (anxiety disorders) with TAG share estimates

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 TAG: excessive worry most days for ≥6 months with associated symptoms (restlessness, fatigue, irritability, sleep disturbance) and functional impairment

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ICD-11 adapted for SUS primary care screening
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Psychotherapy (CBT) and pharmacotherapy (SSRIs like sertraline) via SUS; multidisciplinary teams in CAPS
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Regional disparities in access (rural North/Northeast), stigma, overburdened system
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Expansion of mental health services through Family Health Strategy (ESF) and NASF teams
